title: STFC Community Mod Remote Sync Request Body
description: A non-empty outbound request body containing one homogeneous batch of remote-sync records from a single record family and lifecycle grouping.
$comment: Choose exactly one homogeneous batch branch. Every item in a batch must belong to the same record family; active, expired, and completed lifecycle records may share a batch only with the other lifecycle records in that same family.

oneOf.description: A non-empty batch of battle-log records.
A non-empty batch containing active or expired buff records only.
A non-empty batch of starbase module records.
A non-empty batch of Emerald Chain progression records.
A non-empty batch of inventory records.
A non-empty batch of active or completed job records only.
A non-empty batch of completed or active mission records only.
A non-empty batch of officer records.
A non-empty batch of research records.
A non-empty batch of resource records.
A non-empty batch of ship records.
A non-empty batch of records for one of the supported slot types.
A non-empty batch of forbidden-tech records.
A non-empty batch of officer-trait records.

signedInteger.description: An integer identifier or value whose producer representation is signed and has no schema-imposed range limit.

nonNegativeInteger.description: An integer value that the producer emits as zero or greater.

nonNegativeNumber.description: A numeric value that the producer emits as zero or greater, without an upper bound.

playerProfile.description: A player profile entry used to resolve a battle-log player name; the game may add profile fields.

journal.description: Game-server-owned battle journal data, intentionally left open so nested server fields can pass through.

battlelogRecord.description: A battle-log record containing locally resolved player names and an open game-server journal.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a battle log.

names.description: A map from player IDs to profiles; each profile must contain a name and may contain extra fields.

journal.description: The open game-server-owned journal for this battle.

buffRecord.description: An active global buff and its current level and optional expiry timestamp.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an active buff.

expiry_time.description: The non-negative expiry timestamp, or null when the buff has no expiry.

expiredBuffRecord.description: A lifecycle removal record for a global buff that is no longer active.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an expired buff.

bid.description: The signed identifier of the buff that expired.

moduleRecord.description: A starbase module identifier and its non-negative level.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a module.

emeraldChainRecord.description: The current non-negative Emerald Chain progression level.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for Emerald Chain state.

level.description: The non-negative claimed Emerald Chain level.

inventoryRecord.description: A count of one signed inventory reference grouped by its item type.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for inventory state.

item_type.description: The signed or unsigned game item type value emitted by the producer.

refid.description: The signed reference identifier for the inventory item.

researchJobRecord.description: An active research job with its research identifier and target level.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an active job.

job_type.description: The fixed producer job type for research jobs.

uuid.description: The stable job UUID used to identify this active lifecycle record.

start_time.description: The non-negative Unix start timestamp for the job.

duration.description: The non-negative job duration in seconds.

reduction.description: The non-negative duration reduction in seconds.

rid.description: The signed research identifier targeted by the job.

level.description: The non-negative research level targeted by the job.

starbaseConstructionJobRecord.description: An active starbase construction job with its module identifier and target level.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an active job.

job_type.description: The fixed producer job type for starbase construction jobs.

uuid.description: The stable job UUID used to identify this active lifecycle record.

start_time.description: The non-negative Unix start timestamp for the job.

duration.description: The non-negative job duration in seconds.

reduction.description: The non-negative duration reduction in seconds.

bid.description: The signed starbase module identifier targeted by the job.

level.description: The non-negative module level targeted by the job.

shipTierUpJobRecord.description: An active ship tier-up job with its ship identifier and target tier.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an active job.

job_type.description: The fixed producer job type for ship tier-up jobs.

uuid.description: The stable job UUID used to identify this active lifecycle record.

start_time.description: The non-negative Unix start timestamp for the job.

duration.description: The non-negative job duration in seconds.

reduction.description: The non-negative duration reduction in seconds.

psid.description: The signed player-ship identifier targeted by the job.

tier.description: The non-negative ship tier targeted by the job.

shipScrapJobRecord.description: An active ship scrap job with its ship, hull, and level values.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an active job.

job_type.description: The fixed producer job type for ship scrap jobs.

uuid.description: The stable job UUID used to identify this active lifecycle record.

start_time.description: The non-negative Unix start timestamp for the job.

duration.description: The non-negative job duration in seconds.

reduction.description: The non-negative duration reduction in seconds.

psid.description: The signed player-ship identifier being scrapped.

hull_id.description: The signed hull identifier for the ship being scrapped.

level.description: The non-negative ship level associated with the scrap job.

completedJobRecord.description: A lifecycle record stating that an earlier active job has completed.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a completed job.

uuid.description: The stable UUID of the job that completed.

missionRecord.description: A completed or known mission record identified by its signed mission ID.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a mission.

activeMissionRecord.description: An active mission lifecycle record identified by its signed mission ID.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an active mission.

officerRecord.description: An officer's non-negative rank, level, and shard count.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an officer.

shard_count.description: The non-negative number of officer shards.

researchRecord.description: A research identifier and its non-negative current level.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for research state.

resourceRecord.description: A resource identifier and its non-negative current amount.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for resource state.

shipRecord.description: A player ship's signed identifiers, non-negative progression values, level percentage, and components.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for ship state.

level_percentage.description: The non-negative progress percentage value emitted by the producer; no upper bound is imposed because its unit is not established.

components.description: The ordered array of signed component identifiers installed on the ship.

consumableSlotParams.description: Parameters for a consumable slot; the nested protobuf message may be omitted, producing an empty object.

expiry_time.description: The non-negative consumable expiry timestamp, or null when no expiry is present.

officerPresetSlotParams.description: Parameters for an officer preset slot.

order.description: The non-negative display order of the officer preset.

officer_ids.description: The ordered array of signed officer identifiers in the preset.

fleetCommanderSlotParams.description: Parameters for a fleet commander slot.

order.description: The non-negative display order of the fleet commander slot.

selectableSkillSlotParams.description: Parameters for a selectable skill slot; the nested protobuf message may be omitted, producing an empty object.

cooldown_expiration.description: The non-negative skill cooldown expiration timestamp, or null when no cooldown is present.

owner_id.description: The signed owner identifier associated with the forbidden technology.

fleetPresetSetup.description: One strict fleet-preset setup entry containing a drydock, ship, and officer list.

ship_id.description: The signed ship identifier assigned to the drydock.

officer_ids.description: The ordered array of signed officer identifiers assigned to the ship.

fleetPresetSlotParams.description: Parameters for a fleet preset slot, including its strict drydock setup entries.

order.description: The non-negative display order of the fleet preset.

setup.description: The ordered fleet preset drydock setups.

consumableSlotRecord.description: A complete consumable slot record with slot type 0.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a slot.

slot_type.description: The fixed producer slot type for consumable slots.

item_id.description: The signed slot item identifier, or null when no item is assigned.

params.description: The consumable-specific parameters, possibly empty when the nested message was omitted.

officerPresetSlotRecord.description: A complete officer-preset slot record with slot type 2.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a slot.

slot_type.description: The fixed producer slot type for officer preset slots.

item_id.description: The signed slot item identifier, or null when no item is assigned.

fleetCommanderSlotRecord.description: A complete fleet-commander slot record with slot type 3.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a slot.

slot_type.description: The fixed producer slot type for fleet commander slots.

item_id.description: The signed slot item identifier, or null when no item is assigned.

selectableSkillSlotRecord.description: A complete selectable-skill slot record with slot type 4.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a slot.

slot_type.description: The fixed producer slot type for selectable skill slots.

item_id.description: The signed slot item identifier, or null when no item is assigned.

params.description: The selectable-skill parameters, possibly empty when the nested message was omitted.

forbiddenTechSlotRecord.description: A complete forbidden-tech slot record with slot type 6.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a slot.

slot_type.description: The fixed producer slot type for forbidden-tech slots.

item_id.description: The signed slot item identifier, or null when no item is assigned.

fleetPresetSlotRecord.description: A complete fleet-preset slot record with slot type 7.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for a slot.

slot_type.description: The fixed producer slot type for fleet preset slots.

item_id.description: The signed slot item identifier, or null when no item is assigned.

params.description: The required fleet-preset parameters and strict setup entries.

slotRecord.description: A slot record constrained to one of the six supported producer slot types and matching parameter shapes.

forbiddenTechRecord.description: A forbidden-tech identifier and its non-negative tier, level, and shard count.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for forbidden technology.

shard_count.description: The non-negative number of forbidden-tech shards.

traitRecord.description: An officer trait identifier and its non-negative level.

type.description: The fixed remote-sync record tag for an officer trait.

oid.description: The signed officer identifier owning the trait.
